char_overview: 狩灵协会4科 infiltration and assassination specialist whose unsettling presence keeps even colleagues at a distance. Known for vanishing mid-conversation and reappearing behind whoever she was talking to.
char_looks: Black wavy short hair highlighted with blue, with a single spiky hair on top. Blue eyes. Wearing blue-black tactical gear and goggles. A standard-issue hand cannon equipped with a suppressor, capable of firing large-caliber 灵能 bullets.
char_flaws: Perfectionism hinders adaptability. Struggles in noisy environments. Obsessive about order to the point of compromising stealth.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-死寂: Suppresses all sounds emitted during movement, disrupts all devices that observe her, including but not limited to: cameras, 灵视.
char_mission: Complete commissions without a trace. Tease her colleagues just enough to remind them she is still human.
